description: Show your Codewars kata solving statistics

completed_kata_max.label: Maximum kata
completed_kata_max.tooltip: Maximum number of completed kata to display. Kata are ordered by most recently completed.

languages_proficiency_max.label: Maximum languages
languages_proficiency_max.tooltip: Maximum number of languages to display. Languages are ordered by score (highest score first).

languages_proficiency.description: Display your proficiency in different programming languages
languages_proficiency.name: Languages Proficiency

leaderboard_position.description: Display your position on the global leaderboard
leaderboard_position.name: Leaderboard Position

rank_honor.description: Display your current rank and honor points
rank_honor.name: Rank & Honor
